title: LIVE WORKSHOPS ALS ONDERSTEUNENDE MAATREGEL VOOR DE IMPLEMENTATIE VAN BIOVEILIGHEID OP BOERDERIJEN
description: A live workshop biosecurity training was used as a supporting measure to demonstrate key practices, share ideas, and solve issues, thereby enhancing the skills, motivation, awareness, and knowledge of poultry stakeholders. This measure was evaluated on twenty pilot farms in Poland and included topics such as external and internal biosecurity, legal regulations, and the Biocheck.UGent® scoring system.
